recommendations.title: The Legend of Al, John and Jack
recommendations.overview: Hapless Depression-era gangsters Al, John and Jack find out their boss wants to get rid of them and come up with a plan to sell him to the FBI, but Al's short-term memory loss could make it difficult.
recommendations.director: Giovanni Storti, Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio

recommendations.title: The Ramen Girl
recommendations.overview: An American woman is stranded in Tokyo after breaking up with her boyfriend. Searching for direction in life, she trains to be a ramen chef under a tyrannical Japanese master.

recommendations.title: Escape From Reuma Park
recommendations.overview: Old and forgotten, comedian Aldo is brought by his sons into a nursing home called Reuma Park where he finds his old friends and partners Giovanni and Giacomo.
recommendations.director: Morgan Bertacca, Aldo Baglio, Giacomo Poretti, Giovanni Storti

recommendations.title: The Rich, the Pauper and the Butler
recommendations.overview: A wealthy broker, his loyal butler, and a poor street seller all see their social positions change in a twist of fate.
recommendations.director: Giacomo Poretti, Morgan Bertacca, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti

recommendations.title: That's Life
recommendations.overview: While on the run from the police, an unlikely companionship blossoms between a funny con man who just broke out of jail, the bumbling cop whose car he seized at gunpoint, and a nitpicking civilian he unwittingly took hostage.
recommendations.director: Aldo Baglio, Massimo Venier, Giovanni Storti, Giacomo Poretti

recommendations.title: InAPPropriate Comedy
recommendations.overview: A no-nonsense cop has a flair for fashion and a celebrity takes revenge on the paparazzi in a collection of comedic sketches.

recommendations.title: Have a Good Trip: Adventures in Psychedelics
recommendations.overview: Celebrities recall their most mind-bending trips via animations, reenactments and more in this comedic documentary exploring the story of psychedelics.

recommendations.title: Ask Me If I'm Happy
recommendations.overview: Aspiring thespians Aldo, Giovanni and Giacomo work dead-end jobs while nurturing their dream production of Cyrano de Bergerac, until love for the same woman tears their friendship apart. Three years later, Giovanni and Giacomo reunite after learning
recommendations.director: Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti

recommendations.title: The Parole Officer
recommendations.overview: A hapless parole officer is framed for murder by a crooked police chief. To prove his innocence he must entice his former clients away from the law abiding lives they are now living to recover the evidence that will save him.

recommendations.title: Three Men and a Leg
recommendations.overview: Friends Aldo, Giovanni, and Giacomo cross Italy from north to south for Giacomo's wedding: the father of the bride, a despotic magnate who is both their boss and father-in-law—since Aldo and Giovanni have also married into the family not for love but
recommendations.director: Massimo Venier, Giacomo Poretti, Aldo Baglio, Giovanni Storti
